programmes.show_description: On the 'Box this time: The Assembly, Genius Game, The Piano, Scam Interceptors, The Americas, Married at First Sight Australia and BBC News (noisy phones).
This time the Goggleboxers watch Married at First Sight Australia, The Summit, LOL: Last One Laughing UK, Boarders, I Swear, Wheel of Fortune and Melania.
The naked truth on sex camming with the intimate stories of different women building empires from their bedrooms - like Maya, who quit her medical degree to go on camera full-time. (Ep1/2)
...Experiment: Natalie and Tom are left questioning everything after some steamy intimacy with Josh and Holly, while Chanice and Richardo invite 15 of the residents for an orgy.
At Queen's Medical Centre in Nottingham, staff treat 16-year-old Kaeden, who's been rushed in after developing a fever, and woodworker Paul, who has partially amputated his thumb.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Kirstie and Phil catch up with two couples who wanted to buy close to the English Riviera in Torbay: newly-weds Sam and Jamie, and Geoff and Sharon and their family.
Stacey helps Katie and Chris, who've lost their renovation confidence after a bad experience. Can they tackle their DIY demons and create their dream space? (Ep4/6)
Bedfordshire and Cambridgeshire. Dave serves up a menu melding flavours 'that no one else would ever think of combining'. Daring... or foolhardy? (Ep2/5)
Visit two is to twins Sara and Paula's hotel in Devon. After an afternoon on the lash at a local vineyard, are there sour grapes in the feedback?

programmes.show_name: A New Life in the Sun
programmes.show_description: Seasonal deadlines crank up the heat for Aggi and Camille in France and Angie and Ash in Italy. In Portugal, summer strain also bites for Harriet and Mondo's holiday cottages.
Angie and Alan want to fulfil their dream of buying their very first property together on Spain's beautiful Orihuela Costa. Can Jasmine Harman find the perfect place for their £60k?

programmes.show_name: A Place in the Sun: What...
programmes.show_description: ...Happened Next?: On Malta, we see Chris' new kitchen from Italy no less! On the Costa Blanca, we revisit Jan and Bill at Casa Milly, that they named in honour of Bill's mum.
Lincolnshire. University lecturer Amanda Sherratt hosts a Japanese evening, including a raw fish starter and sumo wrestling for entertainment. (Ep1/5)
Lincolnshire. Retail manager Ali Roberts plans a refined night of gourmet cuisine and fine dining. But will Alex's outrageous tales ruin the elegant atmosphere? (Ep2/5)
Lincolnshire. Farmer Chris Moore hosts a beetroot bonanza, injecting the root vegetable into every part of his night, while also shocking his guests with his hidden talents. (Ep3/5)
Lincolnshire. Theatre student Jack Stone steps into the spotlight with a 'creative' evening, including DIY pizzas. But Alex steals the show with her shocking outfit. (Ep4/5)
Lincolnshire. Geordie Alex Coxon gives her guests a taste of her home 'Toon', on a night featuring glamorous glad rags, kitchen chaos and a surprising secret past. (Ep5/5)
Danni Menzies helps Poppy and her dad Philip realise their dream of finding a holiday home in Andalucía for their budget of £50k, where all the family can enjoy the Spanish sunshine.
A VW van gets a transformation with a twist, a brick bomb shelter is converted into a bijou bar, and George and Will forge ahead with their ultimate indoor-outdoor living project.
...Luxurious Motorhomes: A drive through a world of amazing motorhomes, redefining life on the road with cutting-edge innovation and prices that rival supercars and private jets.
...Less: In Surrey, fitness-mad couple Nathan and Matt's contrasting cooking styles are putting a strain on their relationship. Can batching help them work out their differences?
for Stand Up To Cancer: Joe Wilkinson, Roisin Conaty, Rose Matafeo, Judi Love, Tom Davis and Jon Richardson recreate the weirdest places that they've ever slept, in cake form!
Comedian Jon Richardson brings his sell-out live show to Blackpool's historic Grand Theatre, sharing his hilarious observations on daily life, from haircuts to crimes against dishwashing.
Sean Lock's stand-up is a blend of finely tuned hyperactive imagination, surreal imagery and insightful observations, from the price of cinema food to jewellery heists.
...Experiment: Tom and Kirsty check in to fulfil Tom's fantasy of experimenting with another man. Natalie and Tom explore a threesome, but will insecurities get in the way?
The naked truth on sex camming with the intimate stories of different women building empires from their bedrooms - like Maya, who quit her medical degree to go on camera full-time. (Ep1/2)
The Goggleboxers have been watching Married at First Sight Australia, Pangolin: Kulu's Journey, The Honesty Box, Silence Is Golden and Good Luck To You, Leo Grande.

Danni Menzies helps Poppy and her dad Philip realise their dream of finding a holiday home in Andalucía for their budget of £50k, where all the family can enjoy the Spanish sunshine.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
In north London, Kirstie and Phil help first-time buyer Ify, as well as Mike and Rosemary, who've spent six years abroad and want to settle down.
Shariqa and Imani have struggled to keep their Cambridgeshire renovation project on schedule. Can Stacey help them finally fly the nest? (Ep5/6)
Bedfordshire and Cambridgeshire. Martina hopes her menu of Thai curries and poached pears will impress her guests... one of whom doesn't like spice or fruit. (Ep3/5)
Delightful décor, stunning views, sumptuous sausages and proper milk await the B&Bers at Simon and Vanessa's coastal guesthouse in Weymouth.

programmes.show_name: A New Life in the Sun
programmes.show_description: In Italy, there's a tight turnaround for Angie and Ash. In Portugal, Harriet and Mondo branch out into events. And in Spain, Rachael and Lee bid to earn a crust at a pie shop.
Claire and Simon are starting a new adventure in Nerja in Spain. Will any of Craig Rowe's options for their £230k get their hearts racing enough to put in an offer?

programmes.show_name: A Place in the Sun: What...
programmes.show_description: ...Happened Next?: Is Uri and Hazel's vivacious villa on Cyprus still delivering the dream? And we see what Karmen has done to her meant-to-be Mijas bolthole.
Lichfield. Enthusiastic business consultant James plans a complex Italian menu, a 1960s Italian dress code and a fun photoshoot. But he spends most of the night in the kitchen. (Ep1/5)
Lichfield. Former mental health nurse Ronnie Imlah shocks her guests with a revelation about her past, and guests JP and Amanda don't see eye to eye over plastic surgery. (Ep2/5)
Lichfield. JP Goodyear-Martinez treats his guests to Jamaican food, on a night of wacky wigs, alarming Lycra outfits and a hula-hooping drag queen. (Ep3/5)
Lichfield. Football coach and first-time cook Tim Travers plans an American menu, with his mum on the other end of the phone to help him every step of the way. (Ep4/5)
Lichfield. There are high hopes for recruitment consultant Amanda's sophisticated evening. But an accident at the table has her guests in hysterics. (Ep5/5)
Frances dreams of buying a holiday home that she can enjoy with her friends and family in Spain's beautiful coastal town of Nerja. Can Danni Menzies find the perfect place for £200k?

programmes.show_name: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programmes.show_description: Phil and Leighla transform their Georgian farmhouse in Stroud with an industrial-style extension, and a couple flip the layout of their Wootton Bassett Victorian end-of-terrace.

programmes.show_name: The Race for Ancient Egypt in...
programmes.show_description: ...Colour: Through the 1930s, as Egypt presses for authority over its own antiquities, foreign archaeologists race to acquire more 'star' discoveries as world war closes in.(Ep2/2)
...Alice Roberts: On the final leg of her journey, from Tarragona to Cartagena, Alice learns how the Romans conquered Spain and gained control of the entire Mediterranean. (Ep6/6)
In Hanoi, Bill explores Vietnam's complex relationship with life, death and war, and a culture defined by spirituality and femininity, and remembers the people who he's lost. (Ep4)
Epic adventure reality contest. In a vast, unforgiving forest, players are pitted against each other to win £100k. The Prey must hunt the money - while the Predators hunt the Prey... (Ep1)
The epic adventure reality contest continues. The first player is culled, and another heart-pounding hunt begins. Will alliances count for anything in the thrill of the chase? (Ep2)
